name: Cranberry Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 Orange, washed, quartered, seeded, coarsely chopped
1 One-inch knob of fresh ginger, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. If using a food processor, process orange chunks for 20 to 30 seconds; add quartered onion and process just until coarsely chopped.
2. Combine the mixture with remaining ingredients in a heavy saucepan. Bring to a boil.
3. Lower heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 25 to 30 minutes.
4. Flavor will improve after aging for a day or two.
